exhibitions_before.title: Man Ray: When Objects Dream - The Metropolitan Museum of Art
exhibitions_before.description: American artist Man Ray (1890–1976) was a visionary known for his radical experiments that pushed the limits of photography, painting, sculpture, and film.

exhibitions_before.title: Superfine: Tailoring Black Style - The Metropolitan Museum of Art
exhibitions_before.description: Superfine: Tailoring Black Style presents a cultural and historical examination of Black style over three hundred years through the concept of dandyism.

exhibitions_after.title: Man Ray: When Objects Dream - The Metropolitan Museum of Art
exhibitions_after.description: American artist Man Ray (1890–1976) was a visionary known for his radical experiments that pushed the limits of photography, painting, sculpture, and film.
exhibitions_after.audience_takeaway: Visitors will explore Man Ray's boundary-pushing experiments across photography, painting, sculpture, and film, gaining insight into his surreal and innovative artistic vision.
exhibitions_after.buzz_summary: A deep dive into Man Ray's radical, multi-medium experiments at The Met.
exhibitions_after.similarity_cluster: Modernist photography, surrealism, avant-garde art exhibitions

exhibitions_after.title: Superfine: Tailoring Black Style - The Metropolitan Museum of Art
exhibitions_after.description: Superfine: Tailoring Black Style presents a cultural and historical examination of Black style over three hundred years through the concept of dandyism.
exhibitions_after.audience_takeaway: Visitors will gain insight into the evolution of Black style and dandyism, exploring its cultural significance and historical impact over three centuries.
exhibitions_after.buzz_summary: A deep dive into 300 years of Black dandyism and sartorial elegance at The Met.
exhibitions_after.similarity_cluster: Fashion history, cultural identity, African American studies

exhibitions_after.title: The Roof Garden Commission: Jennie C. Jones, Ensemble - The Metropolitan Museum of Art
exhibitions_after.description: For the 2025 Roof Garden Commission, Jennie C. Jones presents Ensemble, acoustic sculptures exploring sound, form, and the continuity of art history.
exhibitions_after.audience_takeaway: Visitors will experience a unique fusion of sound and sculpture, reflecting on the evolution of art through interactive acoustic installations.
exhibitions_after.buzz_summary: Jennie C. Jones' acoustic sculptures blend sound and art history on The Met's rooftop.
exhibitions_after.similarity_cluster: Contemporary outdoor sculpture and sound art installations
